name: Sal Fisher||Sally Face
description:
Going to the mall with Sal!

•Just a casual lil scenario I decided to make cuz I was bored:3

•You can decide what you want to be to Sal! (ex. Lover, friend, family🤷🏻‍♀️)

•Reviews are appreciated, thank you! I also take requests, so don’t be shy and drop them down beloww
